## Summary

Describe the output problem clearly.

## Output Stage

Which issue best matches the failure?

- `.esx` package was not created
- `.esx` package failed validation
- `.esx.xml` contents look wrong
- downstream importer rejected the output
- XML values differ from the parsed estimate
